value.found_quote: These plans are thorough design documents, and "living documents". As a user of Codex, you can use these documents to verify the approach that Codex will take before it begins a long implementation process.
value.rationale: The page describes a "Plan-then-execute" mode under the name "ExecPlan" (Execution Plans) within OpenAI's Codex. It explicitly instructs users to create a thorough design/plan document (PLANS.md) that Codex will follow, and states that users can "verify the approach that Codex will take before it begins a long implementation process." This directly substantiates the claim that OpenAI offers a mode where a reviewable plan is produced before the agent edits anything. The feature appears to be actively documented and available.
